name: as_peer_overrides_peer_id
description: Regression test for the as_peer precedence rule. The accept_handshake step sets peer_id to 'original_id'; the serve_chain_sync step uses as_peer: 'declared_peer'. Wire events from the serve step must carry peer_id 'declared_peer', not 'original_id'. This verifies that as_peer on a serve step overrides a peer_id set at accept time.
